Patient Experience · Clinical Trials

Are you a sponsor who wants to know what a patient thinks (and suffers) in your study?

For the first time, your patients have a voice. Real, anonymous feedback at every step of your study. What they feel. What confuses them. What made them drop out.

For patients
A companion that guides, informs, and gives them a voice, so no one faces a clinical trial alone.
For sponsors
Blinded, procedure-level feedback that reveals retention risk before dropout happens.
📱

MyJourney

Our flagship platform, a digital companion for clinical trial patients with blinded sponsor reporting.

⚡

Real-time protocol adjustment

MyJourney surfaces dropout signals early, so you can adjust the protocol before you lose the patient.

🔒

Compliance by design

GDPR · HIPAA · ICH-GCP · OWASP MASVS, built in from day one, not added later.

What we do
Making clinical trials patient-centric, from the inside out

We design technology that transforms clinical trials into experiences patients can understand, value, and remember positively, while delivering blinded retention insights to sponsors that have never existed before.

Our work is grounded in a simple belief: empowering patients ultimately empowers research itself.

Read why we exist →
Our flagship product

MyJourney

A digital companion that turns complex trial protocols into clear visual journeys, and captures anonymous patient feedback that sponsors receive as blinded, actionable insights.

Visual journey map of visits and procedures
Plain-language explanations per procedure
Anonymous feedback, quantitative + qualitative
Family Mode, loved ones follow along
Blinded AI-ready reports for sponsors
The team
Built by people who lived the problem
EV
Ezequiel De Vedia
Co-Founder & CEO
Rare diseases Senior CRA Clinical operations Patient engagement

PatientVerse wasn't built by tech entrepreneurs guessing at a problem

It was built by clinical research professionals who spent years in the field, monitoring studies, sitting in sites, watching patients drop out not because they wanted to quit, but because no one gave them the tools to stay.

Our founder is a Senior Clinical Research Associate specializing in rare disease trials. Every feature of MyJourney reflects direct observations from real studies, not assumptions about what patients might need.

Deep expertise in rare disease clinical trials
First-hand experience with the dropout problem from the field
Understands both patient needs and sponsor requirements
Built the tool they wished had existed during their time in the field
🌍

Global operations

PatientVerse operates globally with presence in LATAM and Europe, designed for international studies from day one.

Compliance by design
Built to the highest global standards
